summary: Replayed ADR 0198 from the latest origin/main line through `make live-apply-service service=rag-context env=production`, fixed the governed service wrapper alias and bounded semantic verification path, repaired a degraded legacy 384-dimension collection with a controller-side semantic seed rebuild, and re-verified end-to-end vector retrieval through the managed role plus the operator query entrypoints.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with httpx --with fastapi --with qdrant-client python -m pytest tests/test_platform_context_corpus.py tests/test_platform_context_service.py tests/test_platform_llm_client.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py tests/test_rag_context_runtime_role.py -q` passed with `70 passed in 3.92s`.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_standby_capacity.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_immutable_guest_replacement.py -q` passed with `17 passed in 0.84s`, covering the `rag-context` to `platform_context_api` wrapper alias used by the governed service entrypoint.

`make syntax-check-rag-context` passed, and `make live-apply-service service=rag-context env=production ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` completed successfully from latest-main replay commit `b2756a4f` with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=96 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16` and `proxmox_florin : ok=36 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14`.

The first post-start query detected the live legacy `384`-dimension collection against the Ollama `768`-dimension query vectors, and the role repaired it with the bounded controller-side semantic seed rebuild before the final vector assertion.

verification.check: Post-apply health and operator query verification
verification.observed: `curl -fsS http://100.64.0.1:8010/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok","collection":"platform_context"}`; `PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/query_platform_context.py --question 'What retrieval backend is active for platform context?'` returned `retrieval_backend: "vector"`; `PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/lv3_cli.py query-platform-context 'What retrieval backend is active for platform context?' --json` returned the same cited vector payload; and a direct authenticated POST to `/v1/context/query` returned ADR 0198 as the top cited semantic match.

notes: Production live apply now succeeds through the governed `rag-context` service wrapper on the latest-main replay path.
The managed verify path preserves a healthy live vector collection when possible and only performs the bounded semantic seed repair when the collection is degraded.

A full repo-grounded `python3 scripts/index_platform_knowledge.py --api-url http://100.64.0.1:8010 --api-token-file .local/platform-context/api-token.txt` rebuild remains an explicit maintenance action because the expanded mirrored corpus exceeds the safe synchronous Ollama rebuild budget on `docker-runtime-lv3`.
